name: Nolus Webapp — Agent Skills
description: Machine-readable index of agent-callable skills on app.nolus.io. The REST API is the primary surface; 85 documented endpoints live in the OpenAPI spec. The Nolus.js MCP server wraps these as tools for AI assistants.

sources.description: OpenAPI 3.1 spec — the authoritative machine-readable contract for all public endpoints
Nolus.js MCP server — 20+ query tools and 8 transaction builders

skills.name: Fetch oracle prices
skills.description: Get current USD prices for supported assets from Oracle contracts

skills.name: List currencies
skills.description: Supported currencies with metadata (tickers, denoms, decimals, icons)

skills.name: List DeFi sub-protocols
skills.description: Available Nolus sub-protocols and their contract addresses

skills.name: Get leverage leases for a wallet
skills.description: Fetch active leverage leases and aggregated collateral/debt for a Nolus address

skills.name: Quote a lease opening
skills.description: Preview what a new leverage position would look like given a downpayment and target currency

skills.name: Build lease-open transaction
skills.description: Generate unsigned transaction messages to open a leveraged lease. The caller signs with their own wallet.

skills.name: Get LP positions for a wallet
skills.description: Active liquidity-pool deposits for a Nolus address

skills.name: Get earn statistics
skills.description: Aggregated earn/LP statistics across the protocol

skills.name: Get staking APR
skills.description: Current NLS staking annual percentage rate

skills.name: List validators
skills.description: Nolus chain validators with voting power, commission, status

skills.name: Get staking delegations for a wallet
skills.description: Active delegations, unbonding entries, and rewards for an address

skills.name: List governance proposals
skills.description: On-chain governance proposals with status and vote tallies

skills.name: Get wallet balances
skills.description: Token balances for a Nolus wallet address, filtered against the gated currency catalog, with USD value aggregation

skills.name: Get gas fee configuration
skills.description: Accepted fee denoms, minimum gas prices, and the gas estimate multiplier

skills.name: List supported networks
skills.description: Cosmos and EVM networks supported by the app with RPC/REST endpoints
